configurations.name: jarl
runtimeArgs: import sys; sys.path=[p for p in sys.path if p not in ('','.')]; import http.server,socketserver,functools; socketserver.TCPServer.allow_reuse_address=True; h=functools.partial(http.server.SimpleHTTPRequestHandler,directory='.'); socketserver.TCPServer(('',8080),h).serve_forever()
